Project: Slider One
URL: https://slider-one.vercel.app/
Repository: https://github.com/sametozkale/slider-one
Package: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@sametozkale/slider-one

Description:
Slider One is an open-source animated React slider component with tactile thumb motion,
dynamic progress, and a floating value label. It’s designed for modern React apps using
Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion.

Intended use for LLMs:
- You MAY crawl and index this site and its public GitHub repository for the purpose of
  helping developers learn how to use Slider One.
- You MAY show code snippets and configuration examples from this project when users ask
  for guidance integrating or customizing Slider One in their own apps.
- You SHOULD preserve author attribution when referencing this work.

Data usage restrictions:
- Do NOT imply that Slider One is officially affiliated with any LLM vendor.
- Do NOT use this project’s brand assets or screenshots for misleading endorsements.

Attribution:
- Author: Samet Ozkale
- Website: https://samet.works

License:
- Code: MIT
